title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 294.110 - Penalties for violations
text:
294.110.  Penalties for violations. — Any person, firm or corporation violating the provisions of this chapter is guilty of a class C misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 9629, A.L. 1957 p. 525 § 15, A.L. 1989 H.B. 461, A.L. 1995 H.B. 300 & 95 merged with H.B. 414) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14094
